name: Continual Learning Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for agent reasoning — multi-turn conversation, failure reflection and root cause analysis, knowledge synthesis from past sessions, strategy adaptation, self-critique and improvement planning, meta-cognitive reasoning about learning progress

prod.note: ~2M tokens/day, gpt-4o for complex reasoning chains

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, continuous learning cycles at scale

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Episodic memory store — session transcripts, task outcomes (success/failure/partial), failure reflections with root cause tags, learned strategies, skill proficiency scores, knowledge graph edges, user preference profiles, temporal learning trajectories

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, change feed for memory consolidation

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for learning analytics

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Semantic memory retrieval — past session similarity search, failure pattern matching, strategy retrieval by task type, learned procedure lookup, knowledge base semantic search, cross-session insight discovery

enterprise.note: 100GB storage, high-volume retrieval, replicas for concurrency

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.purpose: Working memory and session state — active conversation context, recently retrieved memories, skill proficiency cache, hot knowledge facts, learning momentum indicators, cross-session continuation state

enterprise.note: 13GB cache, persistence, zone redundancy, active geo-replication

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Learning lifecycle orchestration — session end reflection triggers, memory consolidation scheduling, knowledge graph updates, failure pattern aggregation, skill proficiency recalculation, periodic memory compaction and forgetting curves

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: User data encryption keys, agent identity credentials, external tool API keys, memory store encryption keys, learning analytics signing keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Learning effectiveness metrics — task success rate improvement over sessions, knowledge retrieval relevance, failure recurrence reduction, memory retrieval latency, agent reasoning chain quality, skill acquisition velocity

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine memory retrieval queries and session summarization — reserve GPT-4o for complex failure reflection, multi-step reasoning chains, and meta-cognitive self-improvement analysis, saving 65% on AI costs

Implement memory compaction with forgetting curves — consolidate low-value episodic memories into semantic summaries after 30 days; not every session detail needs full-fidelity retention, reducing Cosmos DB storage 60%

Cache frequently retrieved memories and skill proficiencies in Redis with adaptive TTL — hot knowledge (used in last 5 sessions) gets 1-hour TTL while cold knowledge stays in AI Search, saving retrieval costs

Batch memory consolidation jobs during off-peak hours — failure reflection and knowledge graph updates are not time-critical; nightly consolidation via Functions consumption plan costs 90% less than real-time processing
Use AI Search free tier for development and scale to S1 only when episodic memory exceeds 50MB — most dev/test scenarios need fewer than 1000 memory entries
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
